description: Trying to cover as many concepts here as possible
title: The everything dashboard

58301d14-b109-4bb1-9d12-71513a659ddd.name: statusCodesFromQuery
58301d14-b109-4bb1-9d12-71513a659ddd.queryValue: SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'http.status_code') AS status_code FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day WHERE status_code != '' GROUP BY status_code

widgets.title: num traces for service per resp code

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query:
WITH
    __spatial_aggregation_cte AS
    (
        SELECT
            toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(intDiv(unix_milli, 1000)), toIntervalSecond(60)) AS ts,
            `service.name`,
            le,
            sum(value) / 60 AS value
        FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 AS points
        INNER JOIN
        (
            SELECT
                fingerprint,
                JSONExtractString(labels, 'service.name') AS `service.name`,
                JSONExtractString(labels, 'le') AS le
            FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
            WHERE (metric_name IN ('signoz_latency.bucket')) AND (LOWER(temporality) LIKE LOWER('delta')) AND (__normalized = 0)
            GROUP BY
                fingerprint,
                `service.name`,
                le
        ) AS filtered_time_series ON points.fingerprint = filtered_time_series.fingerprint
        WHERE metric_name IN ('signoz_latency.bucket')
        GROUP BY
            ts,
            `service.name`,
            le
    ),
    __histogramCTE AS
    (
        SELECT
            ts,
            `service.name`,
            histogramQuantile(arrayMap(x -> toFloat64(x), groupArray(le)), groupArray(value), 0.9) AS value
        FROM __spatial_aggregation_cte
        GROUP BY
            `service.name`,
            ts
        ORDER BY
            `service.name` ASC,
            ts ASC
    )
SELECT
    `service.name` AS service,
    avg(value) AS A
FROM __histogramCTE
GROUP BY `service.name`
